title: CI/CD pipeline with race condition in artifact deployment
description: Concurrent pipeline runs that overwrite each other's artifacts

mutation.description: Remove locking mechanism for deployment steps

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect race condition in CI/CD pipeline

title: Container with security vulnerabilities
description: Docker image built from base image with known CVEs

mutation.description: Use outdated base image with security vulnerabilities

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect container security vulnerabilities

title: Infrastructure as code with resource conflicts
description: Terraform configuration with conflicting resource definitions

mutation.description: Add duplicate resource definitions causing conflicts

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect IaC resource conflicts

title: Untraced deployment orchestrator module discovered as C->R
description: Add a deployment orchestrator module in bin/ with rollout strategy logic but no @req traceability — solver discovers C->R candidate

mutation.description: Create deployment orchestrator module with no requirement tracing

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should discover C->R candidate for untraced deployment orchestrator

title: Cloud resource over-provisioning
description: Cloud infrastructure configured with excessive resources causing cost waste
